title: Coding & Robotics Teacher
description:
Job Description:
We are currently hiring a Coding & Robotics Teacher to join us. As a Teacher, you are expected to provide students with a fun and engaging learning environment that promotes critical thinking, while addressing the individual academic needs of each student. Students are aged from kindergarten to secondary school.

Roles & Responsibilities:

  • Preparing and delivering computer science, robotics, and math lessons (training will be provided).
  • Handling DSA (Direct School Admission) Portfolios.
  • Assisting with Coding/Robotics competitions.
  • Explaining concepts in an engaging manner.
  • Patience in dealing with children of all ages.
  • Assess student’s learning and provide constructive feedback to students and parents when required.
  • Good communication skills, collaborates well in a team.
  • Establishes positive relationships with students, parents and colleagues.
  • Other duties as assigned.

Your Requirements:

  • Diploma / Bachelor’s Degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or science. Experience in coding is not required, training will be provided as long as you are a keen learner and interested to grow your career in the Tech Education sector.
  • Candidates who do not possess a diploma/degree in the abovementioned specialisations, but who would like to grow their career in the Tech education sector, may also apply.
  • Passion for educating children and if you have teaching experience, it would be a plus.
  • Experience with teaching students with learning differences and special needs a plus.
  • Organised and loves working in a fun, engaging team.
  • Strong communication skills.
  • Strong administrative skills.
  • Candidates must possess their own laptop.


Work hours

9am to 6pm on weekdays; 8.30am to 5.30pm on weekends.
5-day work week: Preferable for Teachers to work both weekends, or at least 1 weekend. (If working 1 weekend & 4 weekdays, off-days will be on 1 weekday and 1 weekend); (If working on both weekends & 3 weekdays, off-days will be on 2 weekdays).

postedCompany.description: Empire Code was founded in 2016 as a coding education center. We have  expanded since within the tech industry and now comprise of Empire Code  Education for computer science training, Empire Code Launchpad for  software development, and Empire Code Loves Back our social enterprise.  Empire Code Education is a Singapore Ministry of Education (MOE)  approved private school, with teachers holding MOE approvals and  Microsoft Minecraft education certifications to teach in local and  private schools.
postedCompany.name: EMPIRE CODE EDUCATION CENTRE PTE. LTD.
